description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided wooden advertising board with a chalkboard surface on each side. The frame is constructed from medium-thickness wood, giving it a sturdy and rustic appearance, suitable for outdoor or sidewalk use. One side displays the text 'CAULDRON CAFE' with a hand-drawn cauldron illustration, while the other side reads 'WE'RE OPEN!' above a similar cauldron drawing, both rendered in white chalk. The board is supported by two angled wooden legs joined at the top, forming an A-frame structure that allows it to stand independently. The chalkboard surfaces are matte and dark, contrasting with the lighter, natural wood frame. There are no visible illumination features or additional attachments, emphasizing its simplicity and portability.
description: A double-sided, freestanding wooden A-frame advertising board with chalkboard surfaces and hand-drawn cafe-themed chalk art.
description_view_0: Front view showing 'CAULDRON CAFE' and a cauldron illustration in white chalk on a blackboard surface, framed by medium-thickness wood.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the A-frame structure with two angled wooden legs and no visible signage or chalkboard content.
description_view_2: Reverse side featuring 'WE'RE OPEN!' and a cauldron illustration in white chalk on a blackboard surface, framed by wood.
description_view_3: Opposite side view of the A-frame, showing the angled wooden legs and the board's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: medium-thickness wooden border with straight edges
attribute_advertisement_content: hand-drawn chalk art and text advertising a cafe and its open status
